name: My Name is Zhao Wudi: Starting Over
overview: After an accident leaves Zhao Wudi with no memory of his past, he finds himself in a dangerous, lawless territory. There, he unexpectedly reunites with Shen Xingyu—unaware that she is his wife—and becomes her bodyguard. As they face a series of deadly threats together, fragments of his memory begin to return, leading Zhao Wudi to rediscover their past and forge a new future by her side.
